text:
39 PRs merged this week. The codebase is slightly heavier, but the infrastructure is a lot smarter.

We wired up DeepSeek V4, Claude Opus, and Qwen3-TTS. MCP got a v2.1 overhaul with a dynamic registry (meaning fewer busy-looping orphan processes—you're welcome, Windows users). We also polished the mobile UI and tightened up the analytics dashboard so you can actually read your usage stats without squinting.

Oh, and 9 new community apps sprouted in the showcase.

Docs, endpoints, and the new models are live at pollinations.ai.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #deepseek #webdev #llm #buildinpublic
